lessons.title: Why Linux? The Hacker's Playground
lessons.description: Understanding the philosophy of open source and why 99% of servers run on Linux.

lessons.title: The Terminal: Not as Scary as It Looks
lessons.description: Demystifying the command line interface (CLI) vs the graphical user interface (GUI).

lessons.title: The Shell: Your Digital Interpreter
lessons.description: Meet Bash. It translates your typed commands into actions the computer understands.

lessons.title: Syntax Matters: Spaces, Case, and Arguments
lessons.description: Computers are literal. Learn why `Command -a` is different from `Command-a`.

lessons.title: Your First Command: `echo`
lessons.description: Make the computer talk back to you. Perfect for scripts and testing.

lessons.title: Getting Help: The `man` Command
lessons.description: The most important skill in hacking is knowing how to read the manual.
